tasks.label: 2) Show demo data (CHOOSE cameras)
tasks.command: docker compose exec api python scripts/simulate_events.py --seed 7 --cameras "${input:cameras}"; docker compose down -v; docker compose up -d
tasks.detail: Pick which cameras to display (e.g. 2 3 1, or all), then reloads the dashboard.

tasks.label: 3) Run REAL detection on clips (CHOOSE cameras, GPU)
tasks.command: docker compose --profile pipeline run --build --rm -e CAMERAS="${input:cameras}" pipeline python pipeline/detect.py --cameras "${input:cameras}" --out data/events.jsonl; docker compose restart api
tasks.detail: Runs the AI model on the real video clips for the chosen cameras (needs GPU + clips).

tasks.label: Full reset (wipe DB + restart)
tasks.command: docker compose down -v; docker compose up -d --build

inputs.description: Which cameras? Type numbers like  2 3 1  or  all
